prompt: A long, narrow corridor stretches into the distance, its walls and ceiling showing signs of age and neglect. The floor is cracked concrete, littered with small stones and patches of green moss. Along the left side, a row of rusty, metal barriers stands, their surfaces weathered and stained. The walls are painted a faded white, but large sections have peeled away, revealing the gray concrete beneath, with deep cracks running through them. Above, fluorescent lights hang from the ceiling, casting a cool, dim glow. A red "EXIT" sign glows faintly at the far end of the hall, its light the only vibrant color in the otherwise muted scene. As the perspective moves forward, the corridor appears to recede, emphasizing its length and the quiet emptiness. On the right side, a blue trash can is visible near the end, adding a small detail to the otherwise stark environment.
